name: 历史争鸣
subject: history
curriculum_points: Students will be able to construct a sustained argument that engages with historical debate, using evidence to support their analysis (HL/SL, Paper 2/3 skill).
Students will be able to evaluate the relative merits of different historical interpretations in forming their own reasoned conclusion.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「历史争鸣」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Students will be able to construct a sustained argument that engages with historical debate, using evidence to support t…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Students will be able to evaluate the relative merits of different historical in… 对理解「历史争鸣」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
